traits.locale_text: {n}Парящий рядом {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g} молча смотрит на жреца пустыми глазницами. В них чудится некоторый упрек.{/n}
traits.speaker: ManipulusNunciusSkull

languages.text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

languages.text: {n}近くを漂うサーボスカルが、無言で司祭を見つめている。その空いた眼窩から、何か戒めを感じた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull hovering nearby stares silently at the priest. You sense some rebuke in its empty eye sockets.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der in der Nähe schwebende {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} starrt schweigend auf den Priester.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der in der Nähe schwebende {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} starrt schweigend auf den Priester. Du spürst einen Anflug von Tadel in seinen leeren Augenhöhlen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} flotante observa al sacerdote sin emitir un solo ruido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} flotante observa al sacerdote sin emitir un solo ruido, pero adviertes cierto reproche en las cuencas vacías de sus ojos.{/n}

languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yakınlarda süzülen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmelet{/g}, sessizce rahibe bakıyor. Boş göz çukurlarındaki sitemi seziyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} qui flotte à proximité fixe le prêtre en silence.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} qui flotte à proximité fixe le prêtre en silence. Vous percevez comme une forme de réprobation dans ses orbites vides.{/n}

languages.text: {n}悬浮在旁的{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}无声地凝视着这位神甫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovering nearby stares silently at the priest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}悬浮在旁的{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}无声地凝视着这位神甫。你竟能从其空洞的眼眶中感受到某种责备。{/n}
